items.name: alert
items.description: An inline message banner; severity drives both colour and the ARIA live role.
items.docs: Register <lv-alert> by importing components/ui/alert.ts from your entry point.

items.name: badge
items.description: A small status pill mapping to the status tokens (success, warning, danger, info).
items.docs: Register <lv-badge> by importing components/ui/badge.ts from your entry point.

items.name: button
items.description: A token-styled button primitive that drives a wire action via l:click.
items.docs: Register <lv-button> by importing components/ui/button.ts from your entry point.

items.name: card
items.description: A surface container with optional labelled header region.
items.docs: Register <lv-card> by importing components/ui/card.ts from your entry point.

items.name: input
items.description: A token-styled single-line text input that participates in l:model binding.
items.docs: Register <lv-input> by importing components/ui/input.ts from your entry point.

items.name: label
items.description: A token-styled form label with native for/id association and optional required marker.
items.docs: Register <lv-label> by importing components/ui/label.ts from your entry point.

items.name: light-dom
items.description: Light-DOM styling helper shared by every primitive: adopts a component's base stylesheet once per document. A registry dependency, not a standalone component.
items.docs: Internal helper; pulled in automatically as a dependency of any lievit-ui component.

items.name: separator
items.description: A thin divider with role=separator and orientation.
items.docs: Register <lv-separator> by importing components/ui/separator.ts from your entry point.

items.name: spinner
items.description: A busy indicator with role=status and an accessible label; respects reduced motion.
items.docs: Register <lv-spinner> by importing components/ui/spinner.ts from your entry point.

items.name: textarea
items.description: A token-styled multi-line text input that participates in l:model binding.
items.docs: Register <lv-textarea> by importing components/ui/textarea.ts from your entry point.

items.name: tokens
items.description: The lievit-ui design tokens as --lv-* CSS custom properties. Copied in on first use; the shared design vocabulary every component references.
items.docs: Import styles/lievit-tokens.css once from your global stylesheet. Override any --lv-* value in :root to retheme.
